# @platform/audit-events

Audit event bus: structured event emission, schema-validated audit records, and durable delivery contracts.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @platform/audit-events
Version: 0.1.0
Component: audit-events
Type: library
System: enterprise-react-platform
Domain: operations
Bounded context: audit-service
Owner: team-security
```

```text
Stage: active
Role: platform
Class: active.platform
Catalog lifecycle: production
Visibility: internal
Support level: standard
Review cadence: quarterly
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: team-security
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: true
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Define the canonical audit event schema and typed event emitter interface
- Emit structured audit records for security-relevant actions (auth, data access, mutations)
- Guarantee at-least-once delivery semantics for durable audit trails
- Remain decoupled from any specific storage or transport implementation

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not store audit records directly (delegated to adapter or queue)
- Does not implement compliance reporting or dashboards
- Does not own business event schemas for domain workflows

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Imported by api-runtime and worker-runtime to emit audit events at operation boundaries
- Feature packages may emit domain-level audit events via the typed emitter

## Operational notes

- Audit events must not be dropped ? configure durable delivery in production
- Schema versioning must be incremented on any audit field addition
